# TODO: Proper Head

#--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Source files.
#--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

set (sources
    statmc/denoiser.h
    statmc/denoiser.cpp
)


#--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Target.
#--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

add_library (statmc STATIC ${sources})

set_target_properties (statmc PROPERTIES FOLDER "Third Parties")

apply_static_lib_linker_flags (statmc)


#--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Static libraries.
#--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

target_link_libraries(statmc ${OpenCV_LIBS})


#--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Include paths.
#--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

target_include_directories (statmc PRIVATE ${OpenCV_INCLUDE_DIRS})


#--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Preprocessor definitions.
#--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

apply_preprocessor_definitions (statmc)
